Video.summary: Jamar and Dana sue Marlene and Myriah for $1,200 after a failed puppy deal. They claim Marlene reneged on giving them puppies as agreed. Marlene argues the pups were gifts and refuses to comply.
Video.title: Dog Mating Disaster

Video.summary: In an emotional case, Fi and Kee seek to answer questions surrounding sexuality and loyalty with a polygraph test.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Walls

Video.summary: Elizabeth sues Alexis for $2,162, saying Alexis rented her house for a graduation party and caused major damages, including a broken door. Alexis denies the claims, insists she cleaned up, and accuses Elizabeth of overreacting for money
Video.title: Your Teenagers Trashed My House

Video.summary: Anthony Franco sues Anabel Orellana De Ramirez for $334.50, claiming she agreed to pay for extra luggage charges he covered to bring items for her family. Anabel denies owing him, saying the suit is revenge for rejecting his romantic advances.
Video.title: Suspicious Texts

Video.summary: Ehab sues for $5,000, claiming Melissa and Forest rear-ended his car, causing injuries and damage. The defendants counter, alleging Ehab braked suddenly, causing the crash. They deny wrongdoing and file a $2,300 counterclaim for bumper repairs.
Video.title: Rear-End Ruckus

Video.summary: John Mahoney sues Jesse Patterson for $600 after faulty wiring at Jesse's bar allegedly fried his karaoke equipment. Jesse denies responsibility, claiming John was subcontracted by another company and the equipment malfunctioned.
Video.title: Karaoke Combustion

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating, a nightclub altercation and severe damage to a car find exes Timothy and Krystaly in court.
Video.title: Hariston vs. Figueroa

Video.summary: Desta Krupa sues neighbor Marie for $571.67, claiming she’s stuck paying for an Xbox and iPod bought on her line of credit. Marie counters, blaming payment issues on the credit company and says the iPod was a gift.
Video.title: Feuding Friends

Video.summary: After things go south while living together, exes Eric and Zaniya counter sue each other over money owed.
Video.title: Keeton vs. Barnett

Video.summary: Danette & Matthew sleep alone at night because they live in different states. The Cutlers help them decide where to call home.
Video.title: Mahabeer vs. Turner

Video.summary: With help from a compatibility expert, the judges advise longtime couple Erica and Turk on family and finances.
Video.title: Virgil vs. Virgil Jr.

Video.summary: A Georgia couple clashes in court over an ultimatum to marry or move on.
Video.title: Billingsley vs. Perrilloux

Video.summary: The results of a polygraph test will reveal if webcam star and sugar baby Andrea has been cheating on her boyfriend, Justin.
Video.title: Stephens vs. Harris

Video.summary: Clashing personalities have an entrepreneurial couple butting heads in their business ventures.
Video.title: Tunstall vs. Moody

Video.summary: A woman accuses her long-distance boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Matthews vs. Bryant

Video.summary: A shocking twist ending determines the future of Latiana and Wynton's rocky nine-year relationship.
Video.title: Weaver vs. Greene

Video.summary: International twerk coach Christopher brings ex-boyfriend Carl to court after they fail at mixing business and pleasure.
Video.title: Lewis vs. Nuckols

Video.summary: After years of ups and downs, the result of a DNA test will make or break a long-distance relationship.
Video.title: Webb vs. Jackson

Video.summary: A series of red flags and an old hometown fling have Danielle questioning her boyfriend's loyalty.
Video.title: Parker vs. Riley

Video.summary: Professional dominatrix Sasha brings her boyfriend, Perrance, to court in hope of spicing up their relationship.
Video.title: Bryer vs. Williams

Video.summary: Exes duke it out in court over the paternity of a child.
Video.title: Cornell vs. Pruitt

Video.summary: Exes squabble in court over who’s to blame for their failed relationship.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Fletcher

Video.summary: A broken cellphone after a heated argument has a Texas couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Oliver vs. Boyce

Video.summary: Sarah brings ex-boyfriend Richard to court for unpaid rent; he says she had an affair with the maintenance man.
Video.title: Frye vs. Hughes

Video.summary: Past infidelity and the discovery of a homoerotic dating profile have husband and wife Laffiama and Amy feuding in court.
Video.title: Murillo vs. Murillo

Video.summary: Anita is ready for marriage, but Roman suspects she has been cheating; a polygraph may push him to propose or dispose.
Video.title: Raggs vs. Walker

Video.summary: Irma demands a refund for the party bus she rented from LaToya, stating it wasn't decorated properly.
Video.title: Unhappy Birthday Party

Video.summary: Kaitlynn claims her ex abused her while pregnant with his child and is here to sue him for over $4,000.
Video.title: Playing House Gone Wrong

Video.summary: After Vera's son was murdered in 2014, she learned that Alstin may be her grandson, and wants a DNA test.
Video.title: Seeking Her Grandson

Video.summary: Heather is suing her mother. After she bred her dog, her mother gave two of the puppies to her sister to sell.
Video.title: Dog Tired

Video.summary: Derek is suing for breach of contract after claiming the female dancers he ordered were on their phones.
Video.title: Dance Party Full of Missteps

Video.summary: Christopher is sued by his mother for parking tickets after being unable to forgive her for choosing drugs.
Video.title: Parking Tickets and Past Troubles

Video.summary: Nelson is here to sue his sister who has battled a heroin addiction for two unpaid loans.
Video.title: Seeking Treatment for Heroin

Video.summary: Trying to regain custody of her children, Shamika wants to prove her ex is the father of her youngest child.
Video.title: Plaintiff’s Paternity Petition

Video.summary: Mikaela is suing her hair dresser after she left mid-service for a DUI class, and now her hair is falling out.
Video.title: When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry

Image.alt: When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry
When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry
When a Hair Dye Appointment Goes Awry

Video.summary: Damien sues Sal for $35 million, alleging Sal's car service ruined his marrage by dropping his wife at his mistress' house. Sal denies fault, prioritizing business growth.
Video.title: Car Service Scandals

Video.summary: Jonah sues ex-friend Elliot for $25,000, defamation, and IP theft, aiming to disband "The Wizarding Warband." Elliot disputes, blaming Jonah's leadership for league decline.
Video.title: Battle Royale

Video.summary: Mindy Santez sues Roy Franklin for $2M over Timmy's ruined Olympic career due to Roy's drunken scooter incident at a July 4th festival. Mindy claims Roy's ongoing violations led to harassment. Roy cites alleged targeting, like cat removal.
Video.title: Rascal Roy & HOA Nightmare

Video.summary: Chris sues ex-wife Lisa for $10K, citing emotional distress and property damage. He says Lisa punctured his emotional support doll, "Dolly." Lisa denies it, blaming Chris's objectophilia and claiming Dolly deflated when he sat on it.
Video.title: Deflated Love

Video.summary: Erica Green is suing her ex-trainer Susan White for emotional distress and fraud, seeking $15,000. Erica reached her goal weight in 2019 but gained 30 pounds during Covid. She signed up for Susan's "Waist Away" program with a weight loss guarantee but gained 25 pounds. Susan blames Erica's non-commitment and countersues for defamation, seeking $25,000. Erica's current trainer, Mark, regrets taking her as a client, as she fired him and he witnessed her unhealthy eating habits.
Video.title: Waisting Away

Video.summary: Giselle is suing her father for Emotional Distress and $145,000 for the cost of canceling her wedding.
Video.title: Daddy Dearest

Video.summary: Maddy sues Vanessa for theft and emotional distress, seeking $300,000. Their IVF journey soured due to suspicions of cheating and missing money. Vanessa claims shared IVF funds; Maddy discovered an affair with Tyler, a mutual friend.
Video.title: Conception, Deception

Video.summary: Daniel sues Jeremy for $800,000, alleging copyright infringement over "Nightshade Ninja" costume copied as "Shadow Shogun." Jeremy denies, claims originality, forgives Daniel for reputation damage.
Video.title: The Hero-Con

Video.summary: Gabriella is suing her former employer for $600,000 for mental anguish and wrongful termination.
Video.title: Anniversary Blowout

Video.summary: Guillermo Logan sues Nancy Grant for $5M, alleging false imprisonment and mental anguish after getting trapped by her security system during a burglary. Nancy defends her system due to past burglaries and questions Guillermo's criminal history.
Video.title: Caught in the Act

Video.summary: Samantha sues Elizabeth and PI Ricardo for $40,000 over false accusations. Elizabeth hired Ricardo to investigate Samantha's husband but wrongly accused Samantha. Samantha claims harassment, and defamation. Elizabeth and Ricardo deny responsibility.
Video.title: Shadows of Doubt
